homepage.title: Jodie Gosling MP | Get Involved Today
homepage.h1: Labour MP for Nuneaton and the Villages
homepage.meta_description: Connect with Jodie Gosling MP for Nuneaton. Access updates, news from Parliament, and community support. Contact her for assistance or to share concerns.
homepage.text_excerpt: Jodie Gosling MP | Get Involved Today 0 Skip to Content Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact I currently serve as the Member of Parliament for Nuneaton, having been elected in July 2024. Previously a teacher and nursery owner, I live with my family in Arley, where I was a local councillor for 9 years. It is my privilege and honour to serve the constituency of Nuneaton and its residents. If you have an issue, I’d like to hear about it. Check the FAQs page to see what I can help with and fill in the form on this page to send me a message. Labour MP for Nuneaton and the Villages How Can I help? By submitting this form you consent to being contacted by Jodie Gosling MP. You can opt out at any time by emailing me at the address below. Click the link to view our Privacy Policy . Updates from Jodie Updates Apr 2, 2026 FOI Reveals Stark Inequality in Pothole Repairs Across Nuneaton Apr 2, 2026 Apr 2, 2026 Mar 30, 2026 Changes to Leasehold Mar 30, 2026 Mar 30, 2026 Mar 28, 2026 Statement Mar 28, 2026 Mar 28, 2026 Jodie Gosling MP Follow Jodie Address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 02 4 7510 5471 Follow Jodie Links Updates FAQs Contact Privacy Policy

pages.title: Contact — Jodie Gosling MP
headings: h2: Want to get regular updates?
pages.text_excerpt: Contact — Jodie Gosling MP 0 Skip to Content Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Subscribe Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates. Email Address Sign Up We respect your privacy. Thank you! Want to get regular updates? If you would like to receive my monthly newsletter, packed with updates from Westminster to Nuneaton, sign up here. If you have feedback or would like to suggest a visit in Nuneaton, please get in touch. By submitting this form you consent to being contacted by Jodie Gosling MP. You can opt out at any time by emailing me at the address above. Click the link to view our Privacy Policy . Jodie Gosling MP Follow Jodie Address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 02 4 7510 5471 Follow Jodie Links Updates FAQs Contact Privacy Policy

pages.title: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Jodie Gosling MP
pages.meta_description: Contact Jodie Gosling MP for Nuneaton residents via email or in-person by appointment. Find ways to connect and stay updated on local and parliamentary news.
pages.text_excerpt: Contact | Get in Touch Today — Jodie Gosling MP 0 Skip to Content Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Jodie Gosling MP Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Open Menu Close Menu Pothole countdown Home Newsletter Updates News From Parliament FAQs Contact Contact me Please see below the methods of getting in touch with Jodie if you are a Nuneaton resident. The best way to get in touch is via email. If you are not sure which constituency you live in, you can use parliament's Find my MP tool . Jodie’s constituency office in Nuneaton is based in the Town Hall. For security reasons, meetings here are by appointment only. Correspondence address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 024 7510 5471 By submitting this form you consent to being contacted by Jodie Gosling MP. You can opt out at any time by emailing me at the address above. Click the link to view our Privacy Policy . Jodie Gosling MP Follow Jodie Address: Houses of Parliament, Westminster, London SW1A 0AA, UK Email: jodie.gosling.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 02 4 7510 5471 Follow Jodie Links Updates FAQs Contact Privacy Policy
